title: Free women's conference on Friday
description: GEORGE - A women's conference at the...
bodyText:
GEORGE - A women's conference at the Conville community centre on Friday 9 August promises to make Women's Day a special occasion for local ladies.

The event is being hosted by Team Strong Women and they invited a big line-up of speakers including Linda Smit, Adv Merlyn Scheepers Olifant, Maria Hoogstaander, Christina Brinkhuys, Luwayda Trantraal, Vanessa Nakazono, Angelique Vezasie and Dora Blaauw to talk at the event.

The speakers will touch on the theme of 'Break the silence'.


> The programme starts at 10:00 and concludes at 15:00. Lunch will be provided.


Entrance is free.

All women are welcome. For more information, contact Linda on 078 180 5909.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
